title: Add color-scheme token to light theme
commitMessage: perf(css): add color-scheme: light to help browser paint

title: Add color-scheme token to dark theme
commitMessage: perf(css): add color-scheme: dark to help browser paint

title: Add font-size: 100% to html to respect browser zoom
commitMessage: a11y(css): respect browser zoom with font-size: 100% on html

title: Prevent scroll chaining on html
commitMessage: ux(css): prevent scroll chaining with overscroll-behavior-y: none

title: Enable ligatures and kerning in body font
commitMessage: refactor(css): enable ligatures and kerning for better typography

title: Optimise text rendering on headings
commitMessage: refactor(css): add text-rendering: optimizeLegibility to headings

title: Prevent text overflow on paragraphs
commitMessage: refactor(css): add overflow-wrap: break-word to paragraphs

title: Hint GPU compositing for animated float badges
commitMessage: perf(css): add will-change: transform to animated float badges

title: Contain layout for terminal card
commitMessage: perf(css): add contain: layout to terminal card

title: Fix min-width on header text column to prevent overflow
commitMessage: fix(css): add min-width: 0 to header text column

title: Create isolated stacking context for header visual
commitMessage: refactor(css): isolate stacking context on header visual pane

title: Stop ping animation for reduced-motion users
commitMessage: a11y(css): disable ping animation when prefers-reduced-motion

title: Stop blink animation for reduced-motion users
commitMessage: a11y(css): disable cursor blink when prefers-reduced-motion

title: Add tabular-nums to metric values for stable width
commitMessage: refactor(css): use tabular-nums on header metric values

title: Add transform-origin to status dot ping
commitMessage: perf(css): explicit transform-origin on status-dot ping animation

title: Hint GPU layer for scroll progress bar
commitMessage: perf(css): GPU-hint scroll progress bar with will-change

title: Increase nav theme toggle touch target to 40px
commitMessage: a11y(css): increase theme toggle touch target to 40 × 40px

title: Increase hamburger touch target to 40px
commitMessage: a11y(css): increase hamburger touch target to 40 × 40px

title: Prevent scroll chain in mobile nav drawer
commitMessage: ux(css): prevent scroll chaining inside mobile nav drawer

title: Add transform to project card hover for lift effect
commitMessage: ux(css): lift project cards on hover with translateY
replace:
transition:
    box-shadow var(--transition-slow),
    border-color var(--transition-slow),
    transform var(--transition-base);

title: Apply translateY on project card hover
commitMessage: ux(css): apply translateY(-3px) on project card hover

title: Contain layout on project card
commitMessage: perf(css): add contain: layout to project cards

title: Add tabular-nums to project metric values
commitMessage: refactor(css): use tabular-nums on project card metric values

title: Add focus-visible ring to skill tags

title: Add tabular-nums to skill stat values
commitMessage: refactor(css): use tabular-nums on skills stats values

title: Add focus-visible ring to footer social links
commitMessage: a11y(css): add focus-visible outline to footer social links

title: Add explicit cursor to footer brand link
commitMessage: ux(css): add cursor: pointer to footer brand link

title: Add user-select and touch-action to buttons
commitMessage: ux(css): add user-select: none and touch-action: manipulation to buttons

title: Add text-underline-offset to links
commitMessage: refactor(css): improve link underline offset for readability

title: Round the animated link underline
commitMessage: refactor(css): round link underline pseudo-element ends

title: Add backface-visibility to icon links for smoother transforms
commitMessage: perf(css): add backface-visibility: hidden to icon links

title: Add print-color-adjust to text gradient
commitMessage: refactor(css): preserve gradient text color when printing

title: Add hover animation to section title underline
commitMessage: ux(css): animate section title underline on hover

title: Add contain: layout to sections for paint savings
commitMessage: perf(css): add contain: layout to page sections

title: Add ::selection styles for brand consistency
commitMessage: feat(css): add branded ::selection highlight colour

title: Add Firefox scrollbar styling
commitMessage: refactor(css): add scrollbar-width / scrollbar-color for Firefox

title: Add prefers-reduced-motion block for all animations
commitMessage: a11y(css): global prefers-reduced-motion override

commitMessage: feat(css): add @print media query for clean printing

title: Add accent-color to html for native form elements
commitMessage: feat(css): set accent-color on html for native control theming

title: Add btn active press feedback
commitMessage: ux(css): add subtle press-down feedback to all button variants

title: Add scrollbar-gutter: stable to prevent layout shift
commitMessage: perf(css): prevent scrollbar-induced layout shift with scrollbar-gutter
